UpdateAgentInstance.documentation: API used to Update details like status, output artifact, etc. for their agents.

AccountId.documentation: Represents the IdC AccountId of the customer

AgentInstanceStatus.documentation: This represents the different states of the agent life-cycle.

agentId.documentation: ID of the agent, keeping as not required as a non-breaking change

agentVersion.documentation: Version of the agent, keeping as not required as a non-breaking change

ownerContactInfo.documentation: Communication channel details so that owners of an agent can receive notifications about the agent

customerConfigurationRequired.documentation: Indicates if the agent requires customer configuration before it can be used in a job.

customerConfiguredAgentDependencies.documentation: Only applicable for orchestrator agents. List of other agents which require customer configuration before the current orchestrator agent can be usable.

visibility.documentation: Agent visibility status configured by the owner of the agent

customerConfigurationRequired.documentation: Indicates if the agent requires customer configuration before it can be used in a job.

customerConfiguredAgentDependencies.documentation: Only applicable for orchestrator agents. List of other agents which require customer configuration before the current orchestrator agent can be usable.

AgentType.documentation: Represents the Agent Types supported by ATX Foundation

ArtifactFilter.documentation: Used to apply filters when listing out artifacts such as listing out artifacts generated by a particular agent instance.

CategoryType.documentation: Refers to the context or purpose of the data within a workflow.

description.documentation: description of the HITL Task that would be displayed in Execution Log

stepId.documentation: The Plan Step this HITL task should be associated to

hitlRequestArtifact.documentation: The artifact containing a manifest and agent specific data around what to request from the user

expiredAt.documentation: If not provided, Platform will timeout when the requesting agent is stopped

tag.documentation: logic identifier to group a list of HITL tasks

DependencyInternalServerException.documentation: This exception denotes that an error occurred in the dependency of a service while processing a request.

FilePath.documentation: Complete file path including directory and filename. Max length is constrained to satisfy 1024 S3 character limit with consideration for the internal file path structure

FileType.documentation: Defines the structural and content characteristics of data.

version.documentation: Returns latest active version if not provided

configuration.documentation: Connector type specific configurations, eg: S3 bucket ARN. Required fields depend on connector type

result.documentation: Will be of type https://a2a-protocol.org/latest/specification/#61-task-object Just like A2A protocol. https://a2a-protocol.org/latest/specification/#73-tasksget

resourceTypes.documentation: List of resource types to retrieve usage data for

usageResults.documentation: List of usage results for the requested resource types

completedAt.documentation: Timestamp at which task was completed - populated for tasks in completed status

tag.documentation: Idenfitifer to chain or group different HITL tasks together

stepId.documentation: Job plan step that HITL task is associated with

HitlTaskFilter.documentation:
Defines filters for querying HITL tasks.

Filter usage rules:

  1. The filters are mutually exclusive. Only one filter can be used in a single query, and each accepts only a single value.

  2. Server-side validation is implemented to ensure proper usage of filters. Multiple values for filters will result in an error.

Example valid uses:

  • blockingType only
  • taskStatuses only
  • planStepId only

Example invalid uses:

  • blockingType + stepId
  • tag + agentInstanceId
  • Multiple values for blockingType

IngestionStatus.documentation: Mapped to Bedrock status: STARTING | IN_PROGRESS | COMPLETE | FAILED | STOPPING | STOPPED. https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/APIReference/API_agent_IngestionJob.html#bedrock-Type-agent_IngestionJob-status

JobInfo.documentation: Consists of details about a job such as the time the job was started

JobMetadata.documentation: Represents the Transformation JobId and the Workspace Id

parentStepId.documentation: Set to ROOT if the entry corresponds to a top-level step

JobPlanStepNode.documentation: Each job plan node consists of a label associated with it, a name which will be displayed to the user, a description, and any children step nodes.

JobPlanTree.documentation: Represents a job plan that is displayed to the user. Each plan is composed of 1 or more steps. Each step can consist of 1 or more sub-steps.

LimitDefinition.documentation: Defines the maximum allowed quota of a metered resource

ListAgentFilter.documentation: Used to apply filters when listing out agents via the ListAgentInstances API

parentStepId.documentation: If not specified, we return all steps. If specified as root, we return only top-level steps. Otherwise, we return steps directly under the parentId

MeteringUsage.documentation: Usage information for a specific resource type

MeteringUsageList.documentation: List of usage results for requested resource types

OwnerType.documentation: Represents the type of agent owner based on their relationship with ATX.

sessionDuration.documentation: Used to set the expiration of the token. Number of seconds

authorizationToken.documentation: Secret passed by the ATX Foundation to the agents

RegisterKnowledgeBaseDocumentResponse.documentation: Will return empty response if this operation is successful

agentInstanceId.documentation: InvocationId of the agent making the API request.

authorizationToken.documentation: Token passed by the ATX Foundation to the agents

RequestContext.documentation: Common structure encapsulating Job Details and Caller Agent's identification expected in all requests

SemanticVersion.documentation: SemVer string restricted to 5 digits per group and only allowing suffix -dev. Also allows the special string latest

result.documentation: Will be of type either https://google-a2a.github.io/A2A/specification/#64-message-object https://google-a2a.github.io/A2A/specification/#61-task-object Just like A2A protocol. https://google-a2a.github.io/A2A/specification/#71-messagesend

Sha256Checksum.documentation: Sha256Checksum must be base64 per AWS SDK specifications

UpdateAgentInstanceStatus.documentation: The UpdateAgentInstanceMetadata API can be used to update the following agent statuses depending on the agent workflow.

filter.documentation: Filter to use when retrievalScope is AGENT_INGESTED. This will be ignored for other retrieval scopes. Note: 'jobId' and 'workspaceId' are reserved fields that will be automatically populated. Any user-provided values will be ignored.

Stage.documentation: The service stage this client will connect to

UseExternalEndpoint.documentation: Use external endpoint pattern for transform-agents service
